metodos.codigoOriginal:
Local lcTxt, lcDir, lcSch, loCfg, loMsg, lcArq

lcTxt = []
lcDir = Addbs(Sys(5) + Sys(2003))

Thisform.pcArqEmail = lcDir + [SigReClt.pdf]

ThisForm.Processamento()

If (Used([crDados]) And Not Eof([crDados]))
	lcTxt = Alltrim(crCabecalho.Subtitulos) + Chr(13) + Alltrim(crCabecalho.Empresa)
	
	lPrintPDFCreator = fGerPDFCreator(ThisForm)	

	If lPrintPDFCreator And File(ThisForm.pcArqEmail)
		lcSch = [http://schemas.microsoft.com/cdo/configuration/]
		loCfg = CreateObject([CDO.Configuration])

		W... [TRUNCADO]

Report Form SigReCtl To Printer NoConsole

DoDefault()
Report Form SigReCtl To Print Prompt NoConsole

Lparameters pAut, pExc

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject([fSqlConector], .Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		.getMes.Value = Month(Date())
		.getAno.Value = Year(Date())

		.chkImpTempo.Value = Iif(pAut, 1, 0)

		=DoDefault()
		
		If pAut
			ThisForm.EnviarEmail(pExc)
			Return .f.
		EndIf
	Else
		=Messagebox([Impossível Efetuar Conexăo Com o Servidor de Banco de Dados...], 0+48, [CreateObject])
		Return .f.
	EndIf
EndWith
* Fim *******************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcMes, lcAno, ldIni, ldFim, ltIni, ltFim, lcLic, lcSub

lcMes = Alltrim(Str(ThisForm.getMes.Value, 2))
lcAno = Alltrim(Str(ThisForm.getAno.Value, 4))
ldIni = Ctod([01/] + lcMes + [/] + lcAno)
ldFim = Gomonth(ldIni, 1) - 1
ltIni = fDtoSQL(Ctod([01/] + lcMes + [/] + lcAno), [00:00:00])
ltFim = fDtoSQL(Gomonth(ldIni, 1) - 1, [23:59:59])
llTpo = (ThisForm.chkImpTempo.Value = 1)

lcSub = [Męs : ] + lcMes + [ / Ano : ] + lcAno

Create Cursor crCabecalho (Subtitulos c(250), Empresa c(250))
Insert... [TRUNCADO]

If (This.Value <> 4) && Se Năo Clicou em Saída
	Do Case
		Case Not Between(ThisForm.getMes.Value, 1, 12)
			=Messagebox([Męs Inválido!!!], 0+48, [Atençăo!!!])
			ThisForm.getMes.SetFocus
			Return .f.

		Case Not Between(ThisForm.getAno.Value, 2000, 2099)
			=Messagebox([Ano Inválido!!!], 0+48, [Atençăo!!!])
			ThisForm.getAno.SetFocus
			Return .f.
	EndCase
EndIf

=DoDefault()
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not Between(This.Value, 1, 12)
	=MessageBox([O Męs Precisa Estar No Intervalo de 01 a 12!!!], 0+16, [Męs Inválido!!!])
	Return .f.
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not Between(This.Value, 2000, 2099)
	=MessageBox([O Ano Precisa Estar No Intervalo de 2000 a 2099!!!], 0+16, [Ano Inválido!!!])
	Return .f.
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************
